name: service-access
description: Harder hand-curated fixture: 5 codes over a multi-theme service-access narrative, with two segments sharing a code (Access barrier) and adjacent themes that are easy to confuse (Institutional vs Informal support, Uncertainty vs Disengagement). Gold spans are author-curated. Bigger/harder than sample-emotions so a live run reveals real model weaknesses, not just an easy win.
transcriptContent: When I first tried to book an appointment, the website kept crashing and I gave up for weeks. Eventually a social worker called me back, which finally got things moving. But the waiting list was months long, and nobody explained what would happen next. I almost stopped trying altogether. My sister kept pushing me to follow up, and that support is the only reason I stayed in the system.

a social worker called me back, which finally got things moving
the waiting list was months long
nobody explained what would happen next
My sister kept pushing me to follow up
